content:
Neptune in Cancer: Meaning, Traits & Crystals

Neptune in Cancer blends the archetypal drive of Neptune (where you dream, dissolve boundaries, and seek the transcendent) with the Water, cardinal nature of Cancer.

  • Planet: Neptune — dreams, imagination, spirituality, illusion, compassion
  • Sign: Cancer (Water/Cardinal) — emotion, nurturing, home, protection, memory

Eastern Perspective

Parallel Eastern reference (not historical correspondence): 七曜 (Seven Luminaries: Sun/Moon + Mars=火/水/木/金/土 五星 mapped to 火曜/水曜/木曜/金曜/土曜). Use as parallel frame only, not as Western-Eastern historical equivalence.
